Name: CAMERA_SUBJECTIVE_PARAM
Description: Defines parameters relating to the camera when precision aiming.

Fields.Name: Camera Behavior Type
Fields.Description: The behavior to use for this camera.

Fields.Name: Camera Reference Point Type
Fields.Description: The reference point to use for this camera.

Fields.Name: Horizontal Field of View
Fields.Description: The field of view (in degrees).

Fields.Name: Focus Offset: X-Axis
Fields.Description: The look-at focus offset on the x-axis (in metres).

Fields.Name: Focus Offset: Y-Axis
Fields.Description: The look-at focus offset on the y-axis (in metres).

Fields.Name: Focus Offset: Z-Axis
Fields.Description: The look-at focus offset on the z-axis (in metres).

Fields.Name: Position Offset: X-Axis
Fields.Description: The position offset on the x-axis (in metres).

Fields.Name: Position Offset: Y-Axis
Fields.Description: The position offset on the y-axis (in metres).

Fields.Name: Position Offset: Z-Axis
Fields.Description: The position offset on the z-axis (in metres).

Fields.Name: Pan Speed Limit: Minimum
Fields.Description: The minimum speed limit for panning (in radians per second).

Fields.Name: Pan Speed Limit: Maximum
Fields.Description: The maximum speed limit for panning (in radians per second).

Fields.Name: Pan Acceleration: Minimum
Fields.Description: The minimum acceleration for panning (in radians per second).

Fields.Name: Pan Acceleration: Maximum
Fields.Description: The maximum acceleration for panning (in radians per second).

Fields.Name: Pan Brake Speed: Minimum
Fields.Description: The minimum brake speed for panning (in radians per second).

Fields.Name: Pan Brake Speed: Maximum
Fields.Description: The maximum brake speed for panning (in radians per second).

Fields.Name: Tilt Speed Limit: Minimum
Fields.Description: The minimum speed limit for tilting (in radians per second).

Fields.Name: Tilt Speed Limit: Maximum
Fields.Description: The maximum speed limit for tilting (in radians per second).

Fields.Name: Tilt Acceleration: Minimum
Fields.Description: The minimum acceleration for tilting (in radians per second).

Fields.Name: Tilt Acceleration: Maximum
Fields.Description: The maximum acceleration for tilting (in radians per second).

Fields.Name: Tilt Brake Speed: Minimum
Fields.Description: The minimum brake speed for tilting (in radians per second).

Fields.Name: Tilt Brake Speed: Maximum
Fields.Description: The maximum brake speed for tilting (in radians per second).

Fields.Name: Upwards Tilt Limit
Fields.Description: The upwards tilt angle limit (in degrees).

Fields.Name: Downwards Tilt Limit
Fields.Description: The downwards tilt angle limit (in degrees).

Fields.Name: Interpolation Type: Transition Start
Fields.Description: The interpolation type at the start of switching.

Fields.Name: Interpolation Type: Transition End
Fields.Description: The interpolation type at the end of switching.

Fields.Name: Interpolation Time: Transition Start
Fields.Description: The interpolation time (in seconds) at the start of switching.

Fields.Name: Interpolation Time: Transition End
Fields.Description: The interpolation time (in seconds) at the end of switching.

Fields.Name: Lens Simultation ID
Fields.Description: The lens simulation parameters to use for this camera.
